ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.notes: Original certificate, text-based, clearly readable. Certificate number SEG-26D-465570, issued 2026-03-02 by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.notes: Invoice PDF contains two separate invoices: Invoice D0485899-46504265 (2 pages, SO 46504265) and Invoice D0485899-46504276 (36 pages, SO 46504276). Both issued by Rosemount Tank Radar AB. The certificate references SO 46506700, Customer PO 4209481597, and Shipment ID 396130860 — none of which match either invoice. The certificate does not reference a specific invoice number.

lc_check.lc_verification_note: No LC reference found in the certificate.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 (page 1 of D0485899-46504265): header 'Rosemount Tank Radar AB, Box 150, 435 23 MOLNLYCKE, SWEDEN'
Invoice page 2 (page 1 of D0485899-46504276): header 'Rosemount Tank Radar AB, Box 150, 435 23 MOLNLYCKE, SWEDEN', Ship From block
All subsequent invoice pages: repeated in header and Ship From blocks

document_pairing.method: The certificate does not reference a specific invoice number. It references SO: 46506700 and Customer PO: 4209481597. Neither of these match the two invoices in the invoice file (SO 46504265/PO 4256024584 and SO 46504276/PO 4256024585). However, the consignor 'Rosemount Tank Radar AB' is the issuer of both invoices. The certificate lists specific article numbers and product descriptions with COO codes. The invoice D0485899-46504276 (pages 2-37) is sold to BEIJING ROSEMOUNT FAR EAST INSTRUMENT CO in China and contains 'Radar Level Transmitter' items with article 3408A1SHA2E77R4AASAAM6C2C4AWQ4Q8WR5, COO SWEDEN. The first invoice D0485899-46504265 (pages 1) contains different serial numbers (25GORK0952131, 25GORK0952132) with COO SWEDEN but no article numbers visible. The certificate lists 5 different product types with different article numbers and different COOs (DK, SG, SE). The consignee in the certificate is 'EMERSON ASIA PACIFIC PRIVATE LIMITE... SINGAPORE' while the invoices are sold to 'BEIJING ROSEMOUNT FAR EAST INSTRUMENT CO... CHINA'. Neither invoice's buyer/consignee matches the certificate's consignee. The certificate references (SO 46506700, Customer PO 4209481597) do not match any invoice in the file.

pairing_validation.validation_note: Parningsvalidering passerad via kriterium 2 (consignor Rosemount Tank Radar AB identifierad i fakturan). Dock matchar varken fakturareferens eller consignee, och certifikatets SO/PO-nummer återfinns inte i någon faktura.

multiple_invoices_check.certificate_references: SO: 46506700, Customer PO: 4209481597 — neither matches any invoice
multiple_invoices_check.result: MANUAL_REVIEW — Certificate references (SO 46506700, Customer PO 4209481597) do not match either invoice in the invoice file. Additionally, the consignee in the certificate (Emerson Asia Pacific Private Limited, Singapore) does not match the buyer in either invoice (Beijing Rosemount Far East Instrument Co, China). Cannot determine which invoice (if any) the certificate relates to.

evidence.description: Consignee not found in either invoice - searched all pages
evidence.raw_text: Emerson Asia Pacific Private Limited not found anywhere in invoice file

checkpoints.certificate_value: Rosemount Tank Radar AB, Box 150, 43523 Mölnlycke, SWEDEN
checkpoints.invoice_value: Rosemount Tank Radar AB, Box 150, 435 23 MOLNLYCKE, SWEDEN (header on all invoice pages)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — Rosemount Tank Radar AB found in invoice header, Ship From block, and footer on every page of both invoices.
MATCH — Certificate states Sweden (via stamp 'SWEDEN'). Invoice states SWEDEN in header address and Ship From address. Also confirmed via VAT No SE556043512401 (SE prefix = Sweden).

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur — consignor name found in invoice header

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is Rosemount Tank Radar AB, Sweden. This name appears identically in both invoices in the header and Ship From block. Country is Sweden in both. Direct match via rule 4.1.0.
checkpoints.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Rosemount Tank Radar AB' i certifikatet återfinns identiskt i fakturans sidhuvud och Ship From-block. Landet Sverige bekräftas via adress och VAT-prefix SE.

checkpoints.certificate_value: EMERSON ASIA PACIFIC PRIVATE LIMITE(D), C/O CEVA LOGISTICS SOLUTIONS, SINGAPORE P 40 PENJURU LANE, #03-11, 609216 SINGAPORE
checkpoints.invoice_value: Invoice 1: No Sold To/Invoice To/Bill To field visible. Invoice 2: Sold To / Invoice To: BEIJING ROSEMOUNT FAR EAST INSTRUMENT CO, BEIJING, CHINA. Ship To: same entity in CHINA.

comparison_steps.result: Invoice 2 has explicit 'Sold To' and 'Invoice To' fields both naming BEIJING ROSEMOUNT FAR EAST INSTRUMENT CO, CHINA. Invoice 1 has no visible Sold To/Invoice To field.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Emerson Asia Pacific Private Limited' or 'Emerson Asia Pacific' in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND — The name 'Emerson Asia Pacific' does not appear anywhere in either invoice. The word 'Emerson' appears only in 'Emerson Company Code: 069SW0233', 'EMERSON TAG NO.' fields, and the EMERSON logo. None of these constitute a consignee, buyer, delivery, or address field containing 'Emerson Asia Pacific Private Limited'.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate consignee appears in Ship To field
comparison_steps.result: NOT APPLICABLE — Ship To in Invoice 2 is BEIJING ROSEMOUNT FAR EAST INSTRUMENT CO, CHINA. Certificate consignee (Emerson Asia Pacific, Singapore) does not appear in any Ship To field.
MISMATCH — Certificate consignee country is Singapore. Invoice buyer country is China. No Singapore-based party found in invoices.

rules_applied.description: Prioritetsordning — Sold To / Invoice To field used as primary
Särskilda regler — searched all fields for consignee name

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'EMERSON ASIA PACIFIC PRIVATE LIMITED' in Singapore. The invoices are sold to 'BEIJING ROSEMOUNT FAR EAST INSTRUMENT CO' in Beijing, China. The name 'Emerson Asia Pacific' does not appear anywhere in the invoice files. The countries do not match (Singapore vs China). This is a clear MISMATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Emerson Asia Pacific Private Limited, Singapore' kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturans köpare är 'Beijing Rosemount Far East Instrument Co, Kina'. Företagsnamnet och landet skiljer sig helt.

checkpoints.certificate_value: 5 product types: 0565M23230AC406P1100Q1AC (Multiple Spot Temperature Sensor), 775TGXD21I7WA3WK9TJQ1 (Wireless 775 THUM Adapter Assembly - Tank Gauging), 5408A1SUA2NA1GBZZPAS8M5Q4 (Radar Level Transmitter), 2410MFRW001PSNA0A2PQ1 (Tank Hub), 2240SP0840FNA0A2MQ4Q1 (Multi-input Temperature Transmitter)
checkpoints.invoice_value: Invoice 2: All lines are article 3408A1SHA2E77R4AASAAM6C2C4AWQ4Q8WR5 (Radar Level Transmitter) + service charges. Invoice 1: Serial numbers 25GORK0952131/25GORK0952132 with no article numbers visible, described as 'SWEDEN'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate lists 5 specific article numbers. Verify each against invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH — None of the 5 certificate article numbers (0565M23230AC406P1100Q1AC, 775TGXD21I7WA3WK9TJQ1, 5408A1SUA2NA1GBZZPAS8M5Q4, 2410MFRW001PSNA0A2PQ1, 2240SP0840FNA0A2MQ4Q1) can be found in either invoice. Invoice 2 contains only article 3408A1SHA2E77R4AASAAM6C2C4AWQ4Q8WR5. Invoice 1 does not show article numbers.

rules_applied.description: Prioritet 1 — artikelnummer i certifikatet ska exakt kunna identifieras i fakturan

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate lists 5 distinct article numbers. None of these appear in either invoice. The invoices contain a completely different article number (3408A1SHA2E77R4AASAAM6C2C4AWQ4Q8WR5). This is a clear MISMATCH on article number verification.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets fem artikelnummer (0565M23230AC406P1100Q1AC, 775TGXD21I7WA3WK9TJQ1, 5408A1SUA2NA1GBZZPAS8M5Q4, 2410MFRW001PSNA0A2PQ1, 2240SP0840FNA0A2MQ4Q1) återfinns inte i fakturan. Fakturan innehåller ett helt annat artikelnummer (3408A1SHA2E77R4AASAAM6C2C4AWQ4Q8WR5).

checkpoints.certificate_value: 7 PCS, 3 PCS, 7 PCS, 3 PCS, 7 PCS (total 27 PCS for 5 product types)
checkpoints.invoice_value: Invoice 2: 117 x 1 EA Radar Level Transmitter + 3 service lines. Invoice 1: 2 line items with no quantity visible (items 3 and 4).

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate quantities (7, 3, 7, 3, 7) can be identified in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH — The certificate lists quantities per product type (7+3+7+3+7=27 PCS). The invoices do not contain these product types at all (see 4.3 MISMATCH). Since the articles don't match, the quantities cannot be verified against corresponding products.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll — kvantitet per artikeltyp kan inte identifieras

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate quantities are tied to 5 specific product types that do not exist in the invoices. Cannot verify quantity when the underlying products don't match.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets kvantiteter (7, 3, 7, 3, 7 PCS) avser produkttyper som inte återfinns i fakturan. Fakturan innehåller helt andra artiklar.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Invoice 2: Country of Origin SWEDEN on every line item. Invoice 1: No explicit Country of Origin field visible (items show 'SWEDEN' but as a geographic label, not clearly an origin field).

comparison_steps.description: Search for each certificate origin country in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Sweden: FOUND in Invoice 2 (Country of Origin: SWEDEN on all lines). Denmark: NOT FOUND — no explicit origin field in any invoice mentions Denmark. Singapore: NOT FOUND — no explicit origin field in any invoice mentions Singapore.

comparison_steps.description: Each origin country in certificate must be explicitly identifiable in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH — Denmark and Singapore cannot be identified as origin countries in any invoice. Only Sweden is confirmed.

rules_applied.description: Krav på positiv verifiering — varje ursprungsland ska kunna identifieras

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate lists three origin countries: Denmark, Sweden, Singapore. Invoice 2 only shows 'Country of Origin: SWEDEN'. Denmark and Singapore are not mentioned as origin countries anywhere in the invoices. This constitutes MISMATCH since not all certificate origin countries can be verified.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatet anger tre ursprungsländer: Danmark, Sverige och Singapore. Fakturan anger enbart 'Country of Origin: SWEDEN'. Danmark och Singapore kan inte identifieras som ursprungsland i fakturan.

rule_evaluation_log.note: Certificate references SO 46506700 and Customer PO 4209481597 which do not match either invoice (SO 46504265/46504276, PO 4256024584/4256024585). Consignor matches both invoices but consignee matches neither.

Certificate SO/PO references do not match any invoice in the file. However, certificate does not reference a specific invoice NUMBER — it references SO and PO. Rule 8.5.2 applies to invoice number references specifically.

Two invoices from same issuer (Rosemount Tank Radar AB), certificate does not uniquely identify which one. However, given that NEITHER invoice matches the certificate's references, the issue is more fundamental.
Criterion 2 (consignor match) is satisfied. Validation passed but subsequent checkpoints reveal fundamental mismatches.
Consignor name found in invoice header
Certificate consignee (Emerson Asia Pacific, Singapore) not found in any invoice field
None of the 5 certificate article numbers found in invoices
Cannot verify quantities when products don't match
Sweden found, Denmark and Singapore not found

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The certificate might relate to Invoice D0485899-46504276 since it is the larger invoice and both involve Rosemount Tank Radar AB
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The certificate's SO (46506700) and Customer PO (4209481597) do not match Invoice 2's SO (46504276) or PO (4256024585). The consignee in the certificate (Emerson Asia Pacific, Singapore) does not match Invoice 2's buyer (Beijing Rosemount Far East Instrument Co, China). The certificate's article numbers do not match Invoice 2's article numbers. The certificate's origin countries (DK, SE, SG) don't match Invoice 2's origin (only SE). This is clearly a different shipment.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The certificate might relate to Invoice D0485899-46504265 since it is the smaller invoice
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Same fundamental issues: SO, PO, consignee, and article numbers do not match. Invoice 1's SO is 46504265 and PO is 4256024584, neither matching the certificate.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The certificate may cover a sub-shipment within the larger invoice
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The certificate's specific article numbers (0565M23230AC406P1100Q1AC, 775TGXD21I7WA3WK9TJQ1, etc.) are completely different from the invoice's article number (3408A1SHA2E77R4AASAAM6C2C4AWQ4Q8WR5). These are different products entirely.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet avser en annan försändelse än den bifogade fakturan. Certifikatets ordernummer (SO 46506700), kundordernummer (4209481597), mottagare (Emerson Asia Pacific Private Limited, Singapore), artikelnummer och ursprungsländer (Danmark, Sverige, Singapore) stämmer inte överens med fakturans uppgifter. Fakturan är ställd till Beijing Rosemount Far East Instrument Co i Kina och innehåller helt andra produkter.
summary_of_mismatches: Consignee: Certificate says 'Emerson Asia Pacific Private Limited, Singapore'; invoice buyer is 'Beijing Rosemount Far East Instrument Co, China'

Goods description: Certificate lists 5 article numbers (temperature sensors, THUM adapters, radar transmitters, tank hubs, temperature transmitters); invoice contains only one different article (3408A1SHA2E77R4AASAAM6C2C4AWQ4Q8WR5 Radar Level Transmitter)
Quantity: Certificate lists 27 PCS across 5 product types; invoice contains 117+ different items
Country of Origin: Certificate lists Denmark, Sweden, Singapore; invoice shows only Sweden
References: Certificate SO 46506700 / PO 4209481597 do not match either invoice

consistency_check.note: 4 checkpoints have MISMATCH status → comparison_result = NOT_IDENTICAL. Consistent.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.invoice_value: Rosemount Tank Radar AB, Box 150, 435 23 MOLNLYCKE, SWEDEN

sections.motivation: Rosemount Tank Radar AB identifierat i fakturans sidhuvud och adressblock. Land Sverige bekräftat via adress och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: EMERSON ASIA PACIFIC PRIVATE LIMITE(D), C/O CEVA LOGISTICS SOLUTIONS, SINGAPORE
sections.invoice_value: Sold To / Invoice To: BEIJING ROSEMOUNT FAR EAST INSTRUMENT CO, BEIJING, CHINA
sections.rule_applied: Mottagarens företagsnamn kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturans köpare är ett helt annat företag i ett annat land.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare Emerson Asia Pacific Private Limited i Singapore återfinns inte i fakturan. Fakturan är ställd till Beijing Rosemount Far East Instrument Co i Kina. Varken företagsnamn eller land överensstämmer.

sections.certificate_value: 0565M23230AC406P1100Q1AC (Multiple Spot Temperature Sensor), 775TGXD21I7WA3WK9TJQ1 (Wireless 775 THUM Adapter Assembly), 5408A1SUA2NA1GBZZPAS8M5Q4 (Radar Level Transmitter), 2410MFRW001PSNA0A2PQ1 (Tank Hub), 2240SP0840FNA0A2MQ4Q1 (Multi-input Temperature Transmitter)
sections.rule_applied: Artikelnummer i certifikatet ska exakt kunna identifieras i fakturan. Inget av certifikatets fem artikelnummer återfinns.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet listar fem olika artikelnummer som inte kan återfinnas i fakturan. Fakturan innehåller ett helt annat artikelnummer. Produkterna i certifikatet och fakturan överensstämmer inte.

sections.certificate_value: 7 PCS, 3 PCS, 7 PCS, 3 PCS, 7 PCS (totalt 27 PCS)
sections.rule_applied: Kvantitet kan inte verifieras när de underliggande artiklarna inte överensstämmer.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantiteter avser produkttyper som inte finns i fakturan. Verifiering omöjlig.

sections.invoice_value: Country of Origin: SWEDEN (alla artikelrader i faktura 2)
sections.rule_applied: Varje ursprungsland i certifikatet ska uttryckligen kunna identifieras i fakturan. Danmark och Singapore saknas.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger tre ursprungsländer: Danmark, Sverige och Singapore. Fakturan anger enbart Sverige som ursprungsland. Danmark och Singapore kan inte verifieras.

output_quality_checks.consistency_note: 4 checkpoints MISMATCH → comparison_result NOT_IDENTICAL → workflow MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED. All consistent.
